Risk-adjusted standardized performance score for 30-day All-Cause Hospital Readmission 1346 Num 8 These scores do not reflect a negligible change to some practices’ 30-day All-Cause Hospital Readmission rate that did not change the Value Modifier payment adjustment for any but one practice.
I_RSRR_ACR Include ACR in Quality Composite Score Indicator for whether 30-day All-Cause Hospital Readmission is included in Quality Composite 1347 Num 8 Equals 1 if All-Cause Hospital Readmission measure
